name: Worsening Injuries North Salt Lake

mainEntity.name: What if injury worsens after initial treatment in North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What if injury worsens after initial treatment in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Reopen claim with new medical evidence; no strict time limit if causally related. Notify insurer promptly.

suggestedAnswer.text: North Salt Lake: progressive injuries common in construction. Doctors link to original; insurers resist reopenings. Attorney gathers IME, fights denials for ongoing benefits.
